# Vehicle Code
## Division 1. WORDS AND PHRASES DEFINED [100 - 681]
##### § 332

“Freeway” is a highway in respect to which the owners of abutting lands have no right or easement of access to or from their abutting lands or in respect to which such owners have only limited or restricted right or easement of access.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: “Freeway” is a highway in respect to which the owners of abutting lands have no right or easement of access to or from their abutting lands or in respect to which such owners have only limited or restricted right or easement of access.
